name: Heroes
bio: When Reign accidentally summoned Kandor, wielder of Thunderstrike and hero of ages past, it wasn't destiny—it was misdirection. But fate, it seems, has a sense of humor. What should have been a failed summon became one of the greatest partnerships Valkorath had ever seen.

Kandor, a knight from the era of Valerius II, brought gallantry, discipline, and a wisdom long thought lost. He had lived, fought, and died for ideals that had begun to fade. But in Reign, he saw something familiar: a man burdened by duty, yet unwilling to give in to despair.

Reign, in turn, learned from Kandor's presence. Through the Challenge of Rights, their bond deepened—beyond words, beyond eras. Kandor reminded him of what kings should be. Reign reminded him why they often fail.
They fought side by side against kings, beasts, and horrors beyond time. Kandor ultimately fell, but not in vain. His spirit and blade became part of Reign's strength.
In the end, it wasn't just Thunderstrike that empowered Reign—it was the echo of Kandor's loyalty, forever etched into his heart.
